'''Xaset Terep''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] who lived in the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Mandalorian Wars]] and the [[Jedi Civil War]].

==Biography==
During a gathering called by [[Darth Malak|Malak]], circa [[3963 BBY]] (around the time [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] decided to involve the Order in the Mandalorian Wars), Malak made a great plea to his fellow Jedi to follow Revan and himself into war against the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] threat.

Terep ended up casting his lot in with the rogue Knights (among them [[Meetra Surik]], [[Cariaga Sin]], [[Talvon Esan]], and [[Nisotsa]]) going against the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council's]] wishes, and by doing so, helped to split the Jedi Order in two.

In Meetra's vision, he wielded a violet [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]].

==Behind the scenes==
Xaset Terep's face is one of the available male faces for the Jedi Exile, to be chosen by the player at the start of the game. If the player, as a male, chooses his face, then Terep's face would be replaced with another.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}} {{Vision|[[Meetra Surik]]}}
